def get_top_scorers(players, n=5):
    sorted_players = sorted(players, key=lambda p: p.score, reverse=True)
    return sorted_players[:n]


def find_cheapest_products(products, count=3):
    sorted_products = sorted(products, key=lambda p: p.price)
    return sorted_products[:count]


def get_recent_orders(orders, limit=10):
    sorted_orders = sorted(orders, key=lambda o: o.created_at, reverse=True)
    return sorted_orders[:limit]


def smallest_values(data, k=5):
    return sorted(data)[:k]
